profile.name: Hong Liu
profile.headline: Infectious Disease Forecasting · Spatiotemporal Dynamics · Viral Evolution
profile.contactLine: Email: liuh200107@gmail.com · GitHub: github.com/Hylouis233 · ORCID: 0009-0008-3411-5304 · Scholar: Google Scholar · ResearchGate: public profile link retained
profile.summary: Current work centers on documented master-stage research in infectious disease forecasting, influenza co-circulation analysis, outbreak modelling, and related research software. Publication states are presented conservatively and separated by category.

institution.en: Macau University of Science and Technology

program.en: M.Sc. student, Faculty of Innovation Engineering
program.zh: 创新工程学院硕士研究生

detail.en: Current training emphasizes intelligent control technology, artificial intelligence, numerical analysis, statistics, pattern recognition, algorithm theory, and optimization methods.
detail.zh: 当前课程训练重点包括智能控制技术、人工智能基础、数值分析、统计学导论、模式识别、算法理论基础与优化方法基础。

program.en: Undergraduate training in public health and preventive medicine
program.zh: 公共卫生与预防医学本科背景

meta.en: Interdisciplinary preparation spanning public health, epidemiology, statistics, and data analysis
meta.zh: 具备公共卫生、流行病学、统计分析与数据科学交叉基础

detail.en: Academic and project experience during the undergraduate stage laid the groundwork for infectious-disease modelling, health data analysis, and later AI-assisted research workflows. Selected high-mark coursework: Epidemiology, Biostatistics, and Health Statistics.
detail.zh: 本科阶段的课程、科研与项目经历为后续的传染病建模、健康数据分析与 AI 辅助科研流程奠定了基础。

program.en: Multi-source-data-driven study of influenza spatiotemporal transmission dynamics, viral evolution, and early warning in China
program.zh: 多源数据驱动下我国流感时空传播动力学、病毒进化与预测预警研究

detail.en: The thesis links surveillance, environmental, behavioral, and sequence-related evidence while keeping completed work, submitted manuscripts, and future stages explicitly separated.
detail.zh: 该论文方向尝试连接监测、环境、行为与序列相关证据，并明确区分已完成工作、已投稿稿件与后续计划阶段。

researchInterests.en: Multimodal infectious disease forecasting and early warning.
researchInterests.zh: 多模态传染病预测预警。

researchInterests.en: Influenza co-circulation analysis, co-infection signals, and non-stationary time-series modelling.
researchInterests.zh: 流感共流行分析、共感染信号识别与非平稳时间序列建模。

researchInterests.en: Spatiotemporal transmission dynamics, small-sample outbreak modelling, and viral evolution.
researchInterests.zh: 传染病时空传播动力学、小样本疫情建模与病毒进化。

title.en: Multi-modal Adaptive Estimation for Temporal Respiratory Disease Outbreak
title.zh: Multi-modal Adaptive Estimation for Temporal Respiratory Disease Outbreak

status.en: Public preprint; journal submission under review
status.zh: 已公开预印本；期刊投稿审稿中

note.en: First-author MAESTRO study. In the documented evaluation context, the reported R² reached 0.956 on a 10-year Hong Kong influenza dataset.
note.zh: 第一作者 MAESTRO 研究。在已给出的文档评估场景中，香港十年流感数据上的报告 R² 为 0.956。

title.en: Dual-Model Framework for CHIKV Transmission Modeling: ODE and Petri Net Analysis of the 2025 Foshan Outbreak
title.zh: Dual-Model Framework for CHIKV Transmission Modeling: ODE and Petri Net Analysis of the 2025 Foshan Outbreak

note.en: First-author dual-framework outbreak modelling study for the 2025 Foshan chikungunya outbreak.
note.zh: 第一作者基孔肯雅热双框架疫情建模研究，面向 2025 年佛山疫情场景。

title.en: Psychological resilience, occupational stress, organizational trust, and burnout among healthcare workers
title.zh: 心理韧性对医务工作者职业倦怠的影响：职业压力的中介作用与组织信任的调节作用

note.en: Questionnaire-based collaborative study using CFA, SEM, and bootstrap analysis.
note.zh: 基于问卷数据的合作研究，采用 CFA、SEM 与 Bootstrap 分析。

title.en: Influenza co-circulation and co-infection prediction study
title.zh: 流感共流行与共感染预测研究

note.en: Current work on STL-AFD-CWT-WTC-based analysis of co-circulation, co-infection signals, and frequency-domain coupling patterns.
note.zh: 当前围绕 STL-AFD-CWT-WTC 分析框架推进，用于识别共流行、共感染信号及频域耦合关系。

summary.en: Multimodal forecasting framework for respiratory disease activity and early-warning-oriented time-series analysis.
summary.zh: 面向呼吸道疾病活动与预警场景的多模态时间序列预测框架。

relatedPublicationTitles: Multi-modal Adaptive Estimation for Temporal Respiratory Disease Outbreak

summary.en: Research workflow comparing ODE and Petri Net perspectives for the 2025 Foshan chikungunya outbreak.
summary.zh: 面向 2025 年佛山基孔肯雅热疫情的 ODE 与 Petri Net 双模型研究流程。

relatedPublicationTitles: Dual-Model Framework for CHIKV Transmission Modeling: ODE and Petri Net Analysis of the 2025 Foshan Outbreak

name.zh: 传染病数据平台 / 情报平台

summary.en: Crawler, database, ETL, and visualization workflow for infectious-disease news collection, monitoring, and research-oriented data support.
summary.zh: 涵盖爬虫、数据库、ETL 与可视化的传染病新闻采集、监测与科研支持平台。

status.en: Mixed public/private codebases; selected components are private
status.zh: 含公开与私有代码；部分组件为私有仓库

summary.en: BibTeX validation and metadata completion tool for DOI, author, year, deduplication, and citation normalization workflows.
summary.zh: 用于 DOI、作者、年份校验、去重与引用规范化的 BibTeX 文献检查与补全工具。

status.zh: 源材料中明确提及的公开仓库

name.zh: 流感共流行与预测管线

summary.en: Pipeline for multi-region and multi-window influenza co-circulation analysis and prediction workflows.
summary.zh: 面向多地区、多时间窗的流感共流行分析与预测管线。

relatedPublicationTitles: Influenza co-circulation and co-infection prediction study

issuer.zh: “赢在广州”大学生创业大赛组委会

issuer.zh: 中国优选法统筹法与经济数学研究会

title.zh: 2025年第十五届 MathorCup 数学应用挑战赛全国三等奖（研究生组）

issuer.en: China Society for Overall Planning, Optimization and Economic Mathematics
issuer.zh: 中国优选法统筹法与经济数学研究会

title.en: Second Prize, 20th Citibank Financial Innovation Application Competition
title.zh: 第二十届“花旗杯”金融创新应用大赛二等奖

issuer.en: Shanghai University Student Science and Technology Entrepreneurship Foundation; Citigroup Financial Information Services (China) Co., Ltd.
issuer.zh: 上海市大学生科技创业基金会；花旗金融信息服务（中国）有限公司

title.en: Core master-stage coursework
title.zh: 硕士阶段核心课程

organization.en: Macau University of Science and Technology

detail.en: Completed coursework in intelligent control technology, artificial intelligence, numerical analysis, statistics, pattern recognition, algorithm theory, and optimization methods, with a cumulative GPA of 3.63/4.
detail.zh: 系统修读智能控制技术、人工智能基础、数值分析、统计学导论、模式识别、算法理论基础与优化方法基础，累计 GPA 为 3.63/4。

title.en: Student service roles
title.zh: 学生工作与服务

detail.en: Served as a student staff member in the medical school organization department and later as deputy head in the innovation service division of the student technology, entrepreneurship, and employment service center.
detail.zh: 曾任医学院组织部干事，以及学生科技创业与就业服务中心翔安校区分中心创新服务部干事、副部长。

title.en: Laboratory escape-risk digital twin project
title.zh: 生物威胁因子实验室逃逸风险评估数字孪生项目

detail.en: Participated in full-stack development for a P3 laboratory digital twin and risk-assessment workflow involving Unity3D, Python, Flask, MySQL, and scenario simulation.
detail.zh: 参与 P3 实验室数字孪生与风险评估流程的全链路开发，涉及 Unity3D、Python、Flask、MySQL 与情景模拟。

title.en: Protein design and structure-biology tooling support
title.zh: 蛋白设计与结构生物学工具支持

detail.en: Supported target-site discovery and primer design workflows using masif_seed, Rosetta, AlphaFold 3, and RFDiffusion.
detail.zh: 参与基于 masif_seed、Rosetta、AlphaFold 3 与 RFDiffusion 的靶点发现与引物设计流程。

title.en: Infectious-disease news data platform
title.zh: 传染病新闻数据平台

detail.en: Independently developed and maintained a platform covering data collection, cleaning, ETL, database ingestion, and visualization for infectious-disease news and event monitoring.
detail.zh: 独立开发并持续维护传染病新闻与事件监测平台，覆盖数据采集、清洗、ETL、入库与可视化。

title.en: Questionnaire data cleaning and SEM analysis
title.zh: 问卷数据清洗与结构方程分析

organization.zh: 健康相关合作研究项目

detail.en: Handled large-scale questionnaire cleaning, CFA, SEM, reliability and validity analysis, and bootstrap-based inference for healthcare workforce research.
detail.zh: 负责大规模问卷清洗、CFA、SEM、信效度分析与 Bootstrap 推断，服务于医务人员相关研究。

title.en: Selected practice and volunteer activities
title.zh: 实践与志愿活动

detail.en: Participated in outreach, practice, and volunteer activities including recruitment outreach, public-health themed practice teams, and report writing.
detail.zh: 参与招生宣传、公共卫生主题实践队与相关总结报告撰写等实践和志愿活动。

title.en: Competition projects
title.zh: 竞赛项目经历

detail.en: Contributed modelling, optimization, software implementation, and evaluation work in the Huawei Cup, MathorCup, Citibank competition, and related innovation contests.
detail.zh: 在华为杯、MathorCup、花旗杯及相关创新竞赛中承担建模、优化、软件实现与评估工作。
